descriptionHtml:
Sunreef 50  for Sale 2019 owner's version

Introducing the Sunreef 50 from 2019, now available for sale. This model is recognised for its efficient design, functionality, and spacious layout, making it an ideal choice for both private cruising and entertaining. The Sunreef 50 is a versatile sailing yacht that accommodates diverse sailing needs, whether for private use or potential chartering purposes.

Key Features:

The Sunreef 50 offers a unique blend of comfort and performance. It features 3guest cabins  (including an owner's version cabin and a vip cabin) and one skipper cabin, providing ample space for up to 7 people. The yacht is powered by two reliable 80 HP Yanmar engines, ensuring efficient propulsion and maneuverability. With VAT paid and registered under the Spanish flag, she is ready for her next owner without any additional tax concerns.

Designed with comfort in mind, the vessel boasts a spacious salon that flows seamlessly into the exterior areas. A hydraulic platform at the rear enhances usability, providing convenient access to the water. The flybridge is dedicated to leisure, offering ample room for sun loungers and a wet bar, promoting relaxation and socialising.

Specifications:

  • Model Year: 2019
  • Cabins: 4 guest cabins + 1 skipper cabin (total: 5)
  • Bathrooms: 4
  • Engines: 2 x 80 HP Yanmar
  • Condition: Fully equipped and in excellent condition
  • Flag: Spanish
  • VAT: Paid
  • Solar Panels: Yes
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Never Chartered: Yes
  • Generator: Yes
  • Radar: Yes
  • Bow Thruster: Yes
  • Dishwasher: Yes
  • Water Maker: Yes

Equipment:

The Sunreef 50 comes equipped with an extensive range of features:

  1. Electrical Equipment:
    • Shore power inlet: ✓
    • Generator: ✓
    • Inverter: ✓
  2. Navigation Electronics:
    • Sounder: ✓
    • Radar: ✓
    • Speedometer: ✓
    • Wind speed and direction: ✓
    • Repeater(s): ✓
    • TV: ✓
    • Navigation center: ✓
    • Chart plotter: ✓
    • Autopilot: ✓
    • Radio: ✓
    • Compass: ✓
    • GPS: ✓
    • Cockpit speakers: ✓
    • VHF Radio: ✓
  3. Interior Equipment:
    • Dishwasher: ✓
    • Water maker: ✓
    • Bow thruster: ✓
    • Washing machine: ✓
    • Electric bilge pump: ✓
    • Oven: ✓
    • Manual bilge pump: ✓
    • Microwave: ✓
    • Air conditioning: ✓
    • Electric toilet: ✓
    • Heating: ✓
    • Hot water: ✓
    • Refrigerator: ✓
    • Water purifier: ✓
    • Freezer: ✓
    • Battery charger: ✓
  4. Exterior Equipment:
    • Teak cockpit: ✓
    • Cockpit shower: ✓
    • Teak side decks: ✓
    • Davits: ✓
    • Hydraulic passerelle: ✓
    • Solar panel: ✓
    • Liferaft: ✓
    • Cockpit cushions: ✓
    • Cockpit table: ✓
    • Swim ladder: ✓
  5. Rigging:
    • Wheel: ✓
    • Electric winch: ✓
    • Hydraulic winch: ✓
  6. Sails:
    • Fully battened mainsail: ✓
    • Spinnaker: ✓
    • Gennaker/Cruising spinnaker: ✓
    • Furling genoa: ✓

Technical Specifications:

  • Overall Length: 15.2 m
  • Beam: 9.14 m
  • Freshwater Tank: 1 x 800 L
  • Fuel Tank: 1 x 1000 L
  • Wastewater Tank: Available

In summary, the Sunreef 50 from 2019 is now available for sale, presenting an excellent opportunity for discerning buyers seeking a high-quality sailing yacht. With its thoughtful design, robust features, and VAT paid status, it is well-prepared for both leisure and long passages. For individuals searching for a reliable and well-equipped sailing experience, the Sunreef 50 is an ideal choice.
